title: The Island’s Old Wounds Return
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Unknown person #7, Rocks D. Xebec, Usopp, Unknown person #8, Loki, Unknown person #9 as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: meter Fist!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: JWA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They're here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ara- MITAMA!!!*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It just had to be GARP's ship, didn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ROGER!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Garp!!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: Roger, Garp, and Rocks...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Three who would be spoken of as legends in the great pirate era...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But at this time, their blood burned with the passion of youth!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What the?! Empress Gloriosa!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hm? I'm not sure if I have any idea how to use it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The KUja were at the height of their popularity at this time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one could speak of this era without mentioning them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Sister! Hang in there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Many saw them as "idols", and their wanted posters fetched high prices...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: MY HEART ACHES!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Those two are so dreamy...:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stalkers taking creep shots became a daily nuisance for the crew.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Soon after this encounter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Shakuyaku was crowned empress...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and her popularity continued to grow to an unmanageable level.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: IDA'S TAVERN, ELBAF

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I saw Loki Drowning after the ship capsized.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's always acting up so badly when you're not around.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I honestly wondered whether I should help him or not.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Sorry... and thank you for saving him.

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: Loki, pull yourself together!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell?! "IoJ shouldn't have even hesitated to help!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How would '10J feel if Loki had died?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: come on, IDA. LOKI's the one who selfishly took the ship and sailed off.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "So what?! If he can just stand by! And let a kid die, I'd drag him under and brown him myself a hundred times over!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I DIDN'T ASK ANYONE TO SAVE ME!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it!! That's the piss-poor attitude I was talking about!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You lost your mom and your dad's always quite busy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet you must get pretty lonely, right, lol?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shut up, you old HAG!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Haha!! Wouldn't it be better to stay with us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm onto you, IDA! You're just acting all motherly so well let you move into the castle, aren't you? You're just a gold digger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Screw you, Lok!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What you said is unacceptable!! apologize right this instant!! Don't you care how IDA feels?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You kids are just too counte!!!)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're being too sweet on him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hate how he says such mean things to you!! Stupid lok!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Mato... are you crying for me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world is full of kind and beautiful people...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm sick of this God damn country!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every single one of you is weak and dirty!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: I'm going to be free like rocks!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From then on, each time rocks visited to try and recruit Harold...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Loki would attempt to join rocks' crew, but he would ultimately never get his way.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aren't you happy?! I'm going to follow him out to sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: 'Cause I hate you all right back!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 54 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
